title: Miscellaneous Advancements
description: Adds a range of various advancements to encourage the player to do certain tasks and challenges
body:
# Overview

This mod adds a variety of challenges for the player to complete.

# Current Advancements

### Version 1.0.0
Experience Sprinkler: Have 100 experience levels at once.

Experience Shower: Have 150 experience levels at once.

Experience Storm: Have 200 experience levels at once.

Contradictive Concoctions I: Have the Speed and Slowness effects active simultaneously.

Contradictive Concoctions II: Have the Regeneration and Poison effects active simultaneously.

Contradictive Concoctions III: Have the Strength and Weakness effects active simultaneously.

Contradictive Concoctions IV: Have the Night Vision and Blindness effects active simultaneously.

Contradictive Concoctions V: Have the Haste and Mining Fatigue effects active simultaneously.

Deep, Dark, & Done: Kill the Warden.

### Version 1.1.1

Helmet Hatched: Obtain a Turtle Shell.

Creeper Replacement Protocol: Have one of each explosive item in your inventory.

The Creator's Treasure: Have 64 Enchanted Golden Apples in your inventory at once.

Ore Collector I: Have 64 Coal in your inventory at once.

Ore Collector II: Have 64 Copper Ingots in your inventory at once.

Ore Collector III: Have 64 Iron Ingots in your inventory at once.

Ore Collector IV: Have 64 Lapis Lazuli in your inventory at once.

Ore Collector V: Have 64 Gold Ingots in your inventory at once.

Ore Collector VI: Have 64 Redstone Dust in your inventory at once.

Ore Collector VII: Have 64 Diamonds in your inventory at once.

Ore Collector VIII: Have 64 Emeralds in your inventory at once.

Nether Ore Collector I: Have 64 Nether Quartz in your inventory at once.

Nether Ore Collector II: Have 64 Gold Nuggets in your inventory at once.

Nether Ore Collector III: Have 64 Netherite Scrap in your inventory at once.

Nether Ore Collector IV: Have 64 Netherite Ingots in your inventory at once.
